violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer to be sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. PIC stated dish company will be called. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

Wood is used in the construction of shelving at the bar area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine to be turned off and surfaces to be sanitized once ice machine is empty. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
A leak was observed at 3-bay sink faucet. Leak to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025
